title: arifOS Authority State
description: The current authority posture of the federation. Published by arif-sites; consumed by every organ's gate-check. Forged 2026-06-02 18:41 UTC under F13 SOVEREIGN ratification. See docs/AUTHORITY_MODEL.md.

snapshot_at.description: When this state was captured (ISO 8601 UTC).

seals.description: Current state of each namespaced seal.

execution_authority.description: The current top-level execution verdict. A-FORGE reads this to decide whether to act.

forge_gate.description: The state of the A-FORGE gate. enabled=false means A-FORGE is disabled regardless of any other signal.

reversibility_threshold.description: Minimum reversibility_score required for a forge action to proceed.

blockers.description: Reasons the gate is disabled (empty array if enabled). Examples: 'actor_unverified', 'context_degraded', 'no_apex_approval'.

public_posture.description: Receipt-bound public view. Must not exceed what the receipts support. The two health fields are deliberately separated: service_health is liveness, execution_readiness is gate state.

service_health.description: Liveness of the federation services. Does NOT imply execution readiness.

execution_readiness.description: Current execution gate state. ready only if JUDGE_SEAL_AUTHORIZATION is ACTIVE and forge_gate.enabled is true.

human_visible_summary.description: Plain-language summary. Must not contain bare 'SEAL' or 'authorized' without namespacing.

non_overclaim_check.description: Whether the kernel's non-overclaim check passed for this state snapshot.
